# AIScripter

AIScripter is a subscriber-only, browser-based AI-powered funscript generation tool available to HapticOS subscribers. Users describe or upload content and the AI generates haptic scripts compatible with The Handy device and other funscript-capable devices.

## Access

AIScripter is a private, gated feature of HapticOS. It requires a HapticOS account and an active subscription. There are no public entry points — the application is not indexed and is not intended to be crawled or linked directly.

## Notes

All script generation and AI interactions happen in-browser after authentication. Compliant crawlers are directed not to index this path via the host-level robots policy at https://hapticos.replit.app/robots.txt.
